summary: Markets show caution in crypto with Bitcoin pressured by upcoming Fed chair transition to Kevin Warsh, while gold maintains strong bullish momentum hitting new all-time highs around $4,700 amid safe-haven demand and geopolitical tensions. Commodities like oil ease as Hormuz traffic normalizes, and limited weekend trading commentary keeps overall sentiment mixed. No fresh signals from top named analysts like Crypto Banter or Michael van de Poppe in the last 24 hours.
